============
前端ui组件
============

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :glob:

   fields
   ckedit
   

三方前端库
============

* table列大小拖动调整。`colResizable <https://github.com/alvaro-prieto/colResizable>`_

* 排序库。`Sortable <https://github.com/RubaXa/Sortable>`_

* 具备搜索功能的select。 `bootstrap-select <http://silviomoreto.github.io/bootstrap-select/>`_
